projectDescription: A mobile-first web application for comprehensive vehicle management — tracking mileage, fuel consumption, maintenance, and expenses for individual drivers and small fleets.
keyFeatures: Multi-vehicle dashboard with real-time stats and skeleton loading states
Route and mileage tracking with per-vehicle history
Fuel consumption analysis with efficiency metrics (km/liter, km/gallon, cost/km) and interactive charts
Maintenance scheduling with upcoming service reminders by date or mileage
Expense management with category breakdowns, recurring expenses, and tax-deductible tracking
Role-based access control (read, write, admin) with admin user management panel
BFF (Backend for Frontend) proxy pattern keeping JWT tokens in HTTP-only cookies
Mobile-first responsive design with bottom sheet filters, card lists on mobile, and tables on desktop
Dark mode support with theme-aware chart colors via useChartColors hook
Real-time badge counts for upcoming maintenance and recurring expenses in navigation
publicApiSurface: POST /api/auth/login — User login, returns JWT token in HTTP-only cookie
GET /api/auth/me — Get current authenticated user profile
GET /api/vehicles/:alias/fuel-efficiency — Fuel efficiency metrics with date range filter
GET /api/refuels/vehicle/:alias/analysis — Fuel analysis for specific vehicle
GET /api/maintenance — List maintenance records (filters: vehicleAlias, tipo, startDate, endDate)
GET /api/expenses — List expenses (filters: vehicleAlias, category, startDate, endDate, taxDeductible)
GET /api/expenses/upcoming — Recurring expenses due in next 30 days
DELETE /api/auth/users/:id — Deactivate user (admin only, soft delete)
